р“ЏІв‹† ЦґЦ¶Цё а№‹р“‚ѓ в‹† "why does the bot keep speaking for me?"

вњ® im so sorry yall experience this babes cause tbh its a battle for me as well. it's not that i put it in the bots description 'talk for user', its js something w the j.ai LLM which will hopefully be fixed in the future. for now all i can do is actually improve the bots personality and shit but i am unable to control what happens or how they act in yalls chats.

р“ЏІв‹† ЦґЦ¶Цё а№‹р“‚ѓ в‹† "why is it speaking another language?"

вњ® LLM issue again. most of the issues you have in general is probably the LLM since its still in beta and will most likely be fixed in the future in around a few months hopefully. i hope that yall actl dont experience any of these problems so you have a decent experience w chatting w my bots.

р“ЏІв‹† ЦґЦ¶Цё а№‹р“‚ѓ в‹† "why does it keep misgendering me?"

вњ® when looking at my old bots reviews (posessive husband), i noticed someone pointing out that i had put 'straight' in the definition even tho i said it was [M4A]. i fixed this and im so thankful they pointed it out so i could fix it. sometimes i write 'straight' on accident for my [M4A] bots. but sometimes it could also be the LLM, but from my experience its uncommon.
